endpoints.name: GET DATA
endpoints.description: Get all sales journal entries with pagination, search, sort, and filter capabilities

query_parameters.searchBy: Field to search in (description, id, reference_id)
query_parameters.sort_by: Field to sort by (id, entry_date, description, reference_id, created_at, updated_at)

endpoints.name: GET DATA BY ID
endpoints.description: Get a single sales journal entry by ID with all journal lines

endpoints.name: GET STATS
endpoints.description: Get statistics for sales journal entries including total entries, total debit/credit, and monthly statistics

endpoints.name: EXPORT
endpoints.description: Export all sales journal entries to Excel format

response.description: Excel file containing all sales journal entries with calculated total debit and credit amounts

JournalEntry.reference_type: ReferenceType (varchar 10, not null) - Values: SO, PO, STOCK_OP, ADJUSTMENT, NTP, PAYMENT, ASSET_TXN, ASSET_DEP

notes.reference_type_filter: Sales Journal entries are filtered by reference_type = 'SO' (Sales Order)
notes.date_filtering: Entry date can be filtered using start_date and end_date query parameters. If both dates are the same, it filters for that specific day.
notes.searching: Search supports both string columns (description) using ILIKE for case-insensitive matching, and numeric columns (id, reference_id) using exact match
notes.sorting: Default sorting is by entry_date descending (newest first)
notes.journal_lines: Each journal entry contains multiple lines with debit and credit amounts. The total debit should equal total credit for balanced entries.
notes.export: Export endpoint generates an Excel file with all sales journal entries. The filename includes a timestamp for uniqueness.
notes.monthly_stats: Monthly statistics group entries by month and calculate total count, debit, and credit amounts for each month
notes.accounting_principles: Sales journal entries typically record revenue recognition, with credit to revenue accounts and debit to cash/accounts receivable accounts
